summary: Build a romantic Valentine-style landing page like the HappyValentines.in demo, plus a dedicated photo section and an interactive final proposal page with playful yes/no behavior and celebratory animations.
architectural_notes: Add an end-page interactive CTA with a runaway "No" button and a "Yes" success state that triggers layered animations (falling flowers + rising hearts) plus a modal/popup message.

existing_features.title: Create a single-page Valentine-style landing website that closely matches the look, feel, layout, and interaction flow of https://happyvalentines.in/demo, including comparable romantic animations and interactive message reveals.
Implement responsive design for the Valentine landing page so it works well on mobile (small screens), tablet, and desktop, preserving the reference demo’s visual hierarchy and spacing.

Add a coherent, creative visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) appropriate for a romantic Valentine landing page, and apply it consistently across the page (avoid a default/template look).
Add the generated image assets to the frontend as static files under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the Valentine landing page UI where appropriate.
Add a dedicated photo section to the Valentine landing experience with the section heading exactly: "face of my heart", and display the user-uploaded photos in that section.
Add the uploaded images as static frontend assets and reference them from the new photos section using stable paths.
Add a new final page/step at the end of the Valentine flow that displays the text exactly: "will you be my valentine my rasmalai😍🫶" with two options: Yes and No.
Make the "No" button effectively unpressable and implement a playful "run away" behavior when the user attempts to click/tap/hover it.

When the user presses "Yes" on the proposal page, trigger a celebration theme with flowers falling from the top, hearts rising from the bottom, and show a popup message exactly: "I knew you love me so much🥰🫶".

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a website replicating the look/feel and interactions of https://happyvalentines.in/demo (romantic landing page with animations and interactive messages).
Add a dedicated photos section titled "face of my heart" to display the user's uploaded photos.

Add a final proposal page: display text "will you be my valentine my rasmalai😍🫶" with Yes/No buttons; No is unpressable and runs away on attempt; Yes triggers flowers falling from top, hearts rising from bottom, and a popup saying "I knew you love me so much🥰🫶".

projectName: Valentine demo-style romantic landing page (HappyValentines.in clone)
